title: Europe Is Drafting Postwar Plan to Escort Tankers, Officials Say
summary_full: France and Britain are leading planning to have warships escort vessels through the Strait of Hormuz, which officials say is farther along than has been revealed publicly.
summary_public: France and Britain are leading planning to have warships escort vessels through the Strait of Hormuz, which officials say is farther along than has been revealed publicly.
